steps.observed: Page loaded successfully via curl in 1.5ms TTFB, browser wait --load networkidle completed

assertions.title: No console errors during normal usage

steps.observed: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 401 (Unauthorized)

evidence.consoleErrors: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 401 (Unauthorized) - appears 4+ times per page load

assertions.issues: 401 errors appear in console during normal usage. These appear to be from API calls to protected endpoints (e.g., /api/profile) returning 401 when checked before auth token is validated. The errors are non-blocking but violate the 'no console errors' requirement.

assertions.title: Session start is responsive within 2 seconds

steps.observed: Session started, UI shows 'End meditation session' button and message input

steps.action: Measure time from click to active session
steps.observed: ~349ms elapsed time from click to session active state

summary: Tested 3 performance assertions: 2 passed (VAL-PERF-001, VAL-PERF-003), 1 failed (VAL-PERF-002). Page loads quickly (< 5 seconds) and session starts responsively (< 2 seconds). However, 401 Unauthorized errors appear in the console during normal usage, which violates the 'no console errors' requirement.
